entry.title: 2023 Chevrolet Silverado 5500HD Work Truck
entry.ns0:dealership_address: N8167 Kellom Rd., Beaver Dam, WI 53916
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet Buick GMC Beaver Dam is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at N8167 Kellom Rd in Beaver Dam, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin - including Waupun, Horicon, Juneau, Mayville, and Fond du Lac. This 2023 Chevrolet Silverado 5500HD Work Truck is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2023 Chevrolet Silverado 5500HD Work Truck is finished in Summit White and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1WT

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

    Exterior and Appearance

    • Steel wheels are economical and provide proven durability.
    • Steel wheels are economical and provide proven durability.

    Powertrain and Mechanical

    • Diesel direct injection - Crank up the power, cut down the fuel. By injecting fuel directly into the combustion chamber, the fuel mixture combines with the heat of compressed air, causing it to burn rapidly. This increases fuel economy and power while reducing noise for a quieter ride with added oomph, thanks to Diesel direct injection.

    Safety and Security

    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    Other notable features: Want more detail on this Silverado 5500HD, its pricing, or current GM offers? Reach out to Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options. Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin. Give us a call at 920-212-8287 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! Napleton Chevrolet Buick GMC Beaver Dam is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at N8167 Kellom Rd in Beaver Dam, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin - including Waupun, Horicon, Juneau, Mayville, and Fond du Lac. This 2024 Chevrolet Silverado 5500HD Work Truck is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2024 Chevrolet Silverado 5500HD Work Truck is finished in SUMMIT WHITE and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1WT

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

    Exterior and Appearance

    • Steel wheels are economical and provide proven durability.

    Powertrain and Mechanical

    • Diesel direct injection - Crank up the power, cut down the fuel. By injecting fuel directly into the combustion chamber, the fuel mixture combines with the heat of compressed air, causing it to burn rapidly. This increases fuel economy and power while reducing noise for a quieter ride with added oomph, thanks to Diesel direct injection.

    Safety and Security

    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Ignition immobilizer - Theft is a non-starter. You can feel more secure about your vehicle being there when you come back. Ignition immobilizer is a passive security system consisting of a transmitter in the ignition key and a sensor located in the vehicle. If both are not present or do not recognize each other, the vehicle will not start. Ignition immobilizer a sure-fire way to prevent the theft of your vehicle.

entry.title: 2025 Chevrolet Blazer EV AWD RS
entry.ns0:dealership_address: N8167 Kellom Rd., Beaver Dam, WI 53916
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet Buick GMC Beaver Dam is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at N8167 Kellom Rd in Beaver Dam, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin - including Waupun, Horicon, Juneau, Mayville, and Fond du Lac. This 2025 Chevrolet Blazer EV AWD RS is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2025 Chevrolet Blazer EV AWD RS is finished in Radiant Red Tintcoat and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 3RS

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, NONE (ELECTRIC DRIVE UNIT), DUAL LEVEL CHARGE CORD, DUAL-MODE, PORTABLE, TRANSMISSION, NONE (ELECTRIC DRIVE UNIT), WHEELS, 21" (53.3 CM) MACHINED-FACE ALUMINUM, TIRES, 275/45R21 ALL-SEASON SELF-SEALING, BLACKWALL, RADIANT RED TINTCOAT, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, BLACK, PERFORATED SUEDE/EVOTEX SEAT TRIM Want more detail on this Blazer EV, its pricing, or current GM offers? Reach out to Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options. Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin. Give us a call at 920-212-8287 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today!     Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 1.5L TURBO DOHC 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, VVT, TRANSMISSION, 8-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.47 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 19" (48.3 CM) CARBON FLASH METALLIC MACHINED-FACE ALUMINUM, TIRES, 235/55R19, ALL-SEASON BLACKWALL, STERLING GRAY METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, BLACK WITH RED ACCENTS, EVOTEX SEAT TRIM, SUNROOF, POWER, DUAL GLASS, PANORAMIC, SLIDING, FOG LAMPS, FRONT, REAR CAMERA MIRROR WASHER, LICENSE PLATE FRONT MOUNTING PACKAGE, SEAT, VENTILATED DRIVER, SEAT, VENTILATED FRONT PASSENGER, SEAT ADJUSTER, FRONT PASSENGER 8-WAY POWER, SEAT ADJUSTER, FRONT PASSENGER 2-WAY POWER LUMBAR, SEATS, HEATED, REAR, OUTBOARD POSITIONS, MEMORY SETTINGS, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, LPO, SECOND ROW ALL-WEATHER MAT, HD SURROUND VISION, REAR PEDESTRIAN ALERT, TRAFFIC SIGN RECOGNITION Want more detail on this Equinox, its pricing, or current GM offers? entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet Buick GMC Beaver Dam is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at N8167 Kellom Rd in Beaver Dam, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin - including Waupun, Horicon, Juneau, Mayville, and Fond du Lac. This 2026 Buick Envision Preferred is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Buick Envision Preferred is finished in Ebony Twilight Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Comfort and Convenience Package ($1,350 value)

  • Dual-Zone Automatic Climate Control Air Conditioning
  • Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Hands-Free Power Programmable Liftgate
  • Automatic Air Recirculation
  • 3-Channel Programmable Universal Home Remote
  • Air Quality Indicator Sensor

Preferred Equipment Group 1SC

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 2.0L TURBO, 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, TRANSMISSION, 9-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.47 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 18" (45.7 CM) ALLOY WITH TECHNICAL GRAY AND MACHINE FINISH AND HIGH GLOSS BLACK CENTER CAP, EBONY TWILIGHT METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, EBONY SEATS WITH EBONY INTERIOR ACCENTS, PERFORATED LEATHERETTE SEAT TRIM, LIFTGATE, POWER, HANDS FREE OPEN AND CLOSE, PROGRAMMABLE, SEATS, HEATED DRIVER AND FRONT PASSENGER, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, FIRST AND SECOND ROWS, EBONY, STEERING WHEEL, HEATED, UNIVERSAL HOME REMOTE, AIR CONDITIONING, DUAL-ZONE AUTOMATIC CLIMATE CONTROL, AUTOMATIC AIR RECIRCULATION, SENSOR, AIR QUALITY INDICATOR Want more detail on this Envision, its pricing, or current GM offers? Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

This 2026 GMC Sierra 1500 Elevation is finished in Sterling Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 3VL

  • Power Front Windows with Passenger Express Down
  • Power Rear Windows with Express Down

  • Power Door Locks

  • Body Color Header with Gloss Black Mesh Grille Bars
  • Integrated Trailer Brake Controller
  • 120-Volt Interior Power Outlet
  • 220 Amp Alternator
  • TurboMax Engine
  • Manual Tilt-Wheel and Telescoping Steering Column
  • Single Speed Transfer Case
  • GMC Pro Safety
  • Wireless Apple CarPlay/wireless Android Auto
  • SiriusXM with 360L Trial Subscription
  • 2 type-C Charge-Only Rear USB Ports
  • 2 Charge/data USB Ports
  • OnStar Services Capable
  • LED Cargo Area Lighting
  • Steering Wheel Audio Controls
  • Theft Deterrent System (unauthorized Entry)
  • HD Rear Vision Camera
  • Front Frame-Mounted Black Recovery Hooks
  • Wi-Fi Hotspot Capable
  • Trailering Package

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

  • Premium 7-Speaker Bose Sound System
  • HD Surround Vision
  • Multicolor 6.3" Diagonal Head-Up Display
  • Canyon Safety Plus Package

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.

This 2026 GMC Sierra 2500HD SLT is finished in Onyx Black and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 4SA

  • SiriusXM with 360L Trial Subscription
  • Power Front Passenger Windows with Express Up/down

  • 6.6L V8 with Direct Injection and Variable Valve Timing Engine
  • Manual Tilt-Wheel/telescoping Steering Column

  • Sierra HD Pro Safety

  • 2 Charge-Only Rear USB Ports
  • 2 Charge/data USB Ports
  • OnStar Services Capable
  • LED Cargo Area Lighting
  • Steering Wheel Audio Controls
  • 6-Speaker Audio System Feature
  • Unauthorized Entry Theft-Deterrent System

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

This 2026 Buick Enclave Preferred is finished in Moonstone Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Power Package ($2,215 value)

  • 2nd Row 1-Touch Flat Folding Seat
  • Memory Settings

Preferred Equipment Group 1SD

    Floor Liner Package ($450 value)

    • Integrated Cargo Liner
    • 1st and 2nd Row All-Weather Floor Liners
    • 3rd Row All-Weather Floor Liner

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians.     Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Powertrain and Mechanical

    • Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same? With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.
    • An OHV (pushrod) engine typically generates low-end torque sooner than an OHC engine of similar size. Peak torque is achieved at a lower RPM in OHV engines than in other designs, providing good acceleration from a stop.

  • Ventilated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Manual Tilt-Wheel/telescoping Steering Column
  • 2-Speed Active Transfer Case
  • Sierra HD Pro Safety
  • Wireless Phone Projection

  • Trailer Tire Pressure Monitor Sensors

  • LED Smoked Amber Roof Marker Lamps

  • HD Surround Vision
  • Bed View Camera with Two Trailer Camera Provisions
  • X31 Off-Road Package

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

SLT Preferred Package ($1,050 value)

  • Power Sliding Rear Window with Defogger

Sierra HD Pro Safety Plus Package ($1,245 value)

  • Safety Alert Seat
  • Trailer Cam Provisions and Trailer Viewing Software
  • Ultrasonic Front and Rear Park Assist
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
  • Trailer Side Blind Zone Alert
  • HD Surround Vision
  • Bed View Camera with Two Trailer Camera Provisions

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2018 Toyota 4Runner SR5 offered in Classic Silver Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Entune Premium Audio w/Integrated Navigation and App Suite ($345 value)

  • Includes navigation system, integrated backup camera display w/ projected path, Entune Multimedia Bundle (includes 6.1-in. high-resolution touch-screen w/ split-screen display, AM/FM CD player w/ MP3/WMA playback capability, 8 speakers, auxiliary audio jack, USB 2.0 port w/ iPod connectivity and control, advanced voice recognition, hands-free phone capability, and phone book access and music streaming via Bluetooth wireless technology), Siri Eyes Free, Entune App Suite, HD Radio, HD predictive traffic and Doppler weather overlay, AM/FM cache radio, SiriusXM Satellite Radio w/ 3-month complimentary SiriusXM All Access trial, and Gracenote album cover art.

All Weather Floor Liner and Cargo Tray Package ($249 value)

  • Includes front and rear all-weather floor liners and cargo tray.

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.
Other notable features: CLASSIC SILVER METALLIC, BLACK GRAPHITE, LOW FABRIC SEAT TRIM Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2027 Chevrolet Bolt LT is finished in Summit White and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 2LT

  • Front Bucket Seats
  • Engine

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2024 Chevrolet Equinox RS offered in Summit White will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety & Infotainment Package ($1,200 value)

    Advanced Safety Package

    • Adaptive Cruise Control
    • HD Surround Vision
    • Outside Heated Power-Adjustable Mirrors

    Preferred Equipment Group 1RS

      Infotainment Package

      • 120-Volt Power Outlet
      • 2 USB Data Ports with SD Card Reader
      • 2 USB Data Ports
      • Heated Steering Wheel

      Safety and Security

      • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
      • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
      • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
      • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

      Technology and Telematics

      • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
      Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 1.5L TURBO DOHC 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, VVT, TRANSMISSION, 6-SPEED AUTOMATIC, ELECTRONICALLY-CONTROLLED WITH OVERDRIVE, AXLE, 3.87 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 19" (48.3 CM) ALUMINUM, SUMMIT WHITE, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK WITH RED ACCENTS, PERFORATED LEATHER-APPOINTED SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, CHEVROLET INFOTAINMENT 3 PLUS SYSTEM, 8" DIAGONAL HD COLOR TOUCHSCREEN, RS LEATHER PACKAGE, SAFETY AND INFOTAINMENT PACKAGE, LPO, FLOOR LINER PACKAGE, INFOTAINMENT PACKAGE, ADVANCED SAFETY PACKAGE, SUNROOF, POWER, COLD AIR GRILLE SHUTTER, MIRRORS, OUTSIDE HEATED, POWER-ADJUSTABLE, MANUAL-FOLDING WITH INTEGRATED TURN SIGNAL INDICATORS, LICENSE PLATE FRONT MOUNTING PACKAGE, AUDIO SYSTEM FEATURE, BOSE PREMIUM 7-SPEAKER SYSTEM, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, STEERING WHEEL, HEATED, ADAPTIVE CRUISE CONTROL, USB DATA PORTS, 2, LOCATED IN THE FRONT CONSOLE BIN, USB DATA PORTS, 2, POWER OUTLET, 120-VOLT, LOCATED ON THE REAR OF CENTER CONSOLE, MAP POCKET, DRIVER SEATBACK, LPO, INTEGRATED CARGO LINER, HD SURROUND VISION Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.
  • Hands-on cruise control with lane change

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 6.2L ECOTEC3 V8, TRANSMISSION, 10-SPEED AUTOMATIC WITH ELECTRONIC PRECISION SHIFT, ELECTRONICALLY CONTROLLED, GVWR, 7100 LBS. entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet Buick GMC Beaver Dam is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at N8167 Kellom Rd in Beaver Dam, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin - including Waupun, Horicon, Juneau, Mayville, and Fond du Lac. This 2026 Buick Envista Preferred is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Buick Envista Preferred is finished in Ocean Blue Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group G02

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Wireless Apple CarPlay/Wireless Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, EMISSIONS OVERRIDE, CALIFORNIA, ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.2L TURBO DOHC DI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), E85-COMPATIBLE, TRANSMISSION, 6-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.50 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 17" (43.2 CM) BRIGHT SILVER PAINTED ALUMINUM, OCEAN BLUE METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, EBONY SEATS WITH SLATE INTERIOR ACCENTS, CLOTH WITH LEATHERETTE SEATS, AUDIO SYSTEM, 11" DIAGONAL HD COLOR TOUCHSCREEN, AM/FM STEREO., CONVENIENCE I PACKAGE, CONVENIENCE II PACKAGE, ADVANCED SAFETY PACKAGE, WIPERS, FRONT INTERMITTENT, RAINSENSE, LICENSE PLATE BRACKET, FRONT, LIFTGATE, POWER, SEATS, HEATED DRIVER AND FRONT PASSENGER, SEAT ADJUSTER, DRIVER 8-WAY POWER, SEAT ADJUSTER, 2-WAY POWER DRIVER LUMBAR CONTROL, STEERING WHEEL, WRAPPED, FLAT-BOTTOM, STEERING WHEEL, HEATED, KEYLESS OPEN, FRONT DOORS, ADAPTIVE CRUISE CONTROL, WIRELESS CHARGING, REAR CROSS TRAFFIC ALERT, LANE CHANGE ALERT WITH SIDE BLIND ZONE ALERT Want more detail on this Envista, its pricing, or current GM offers? entry.title: 2024 Audi Q5 S line Premium Plus
entry.ns0:dealership_address: N8167 Kellom Rd., Beaver Dam, WI 53916
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2024 Audi Q5 S line Premium Plus offered in Arkona White will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience Package

  • Audi Advanced Key
  • Auto-Dimming Power Folding Exterior Mirrors
  • Driver Seat Memory
  • SiriusXM with 360L

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians.     • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

entry.title: 2027 Chevrolet Equinox AWD RS
entry.ns0:dealership_address: N8167 Kellom Rd., Beaver Dam, WI 53916
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet Buick GMC Beaver Dam is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at N8167 Kellom Rd in Beaver Dam, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin - including Waupun, Horicon, Juneau, Mayville, and Fond du Lac. This 2027 Chevrolet Equinox AWD RS is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2027 Chevrolet Equinox AWD RS is finished in Sterling Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 1.5L TURBO DOHC 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, VVT, TRANSMISSION, 8-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.47 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 19" (48.3 CM) CARBON FLASH METALLIC MACHINED-FACE ALUMINUM, TIRES, 235/55R19, ALL-SEASON BLACKWALL, STERLING GRAY METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, BLACK WITH RED ACCENTS, EVOTEX SEAT TRIM, CONVENIENCE PACKAGE III, SUNROOF, POWER, DUAL GLASS, PANORAMIC, SLIDING, LICENSE PLATE FRONT MOUNTING PACKAGE, SEAT, VENTILATED DRIVER, SEAT, VENTILATED FRONT PASSENGER, SEAT ADJUSTER, FRONT PASSENGER 8-WAY POWER, SEAT ADJUSTER, FRONT PASSENGER 2-WAY POWER LUMBAR, SEATS, HEATED, REAR, OUTBOARD POSITIONS, MEMORY SETTINGS, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, LPO, SECOND ROW ALL-WEATHER MAT Want more detail on this Equinox, its pricing, or current GM offers? That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2023 GMC Yukon XL AT4 offered in Summit White will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Technology Package ($1,150 value)

  • Rear Pedestrian Alert
  • HD Surround Vision
  • 15" Diagonal Multi-Color Head-Up Display

Preferred Equipment Group 4SB

  • 2 Presets For Outside Rearview Mirrors
  • 3rd Row 60/40 Power-Folding Split-Bench Seat
  • Power Release 2nd Row 60/40 Split-Folding Bench Seat
  • Bright Front and Rear Door Sill Plates
  • Inside Rearview Auto-Dimming Mirror
  • Outside Heated Power-Adjustable Mirrors
  • 3 Years of GMC Connected Services
  • Safety Alert Seat
  • Hill Descent Control
  • Heavy-Duty Air Filter
  • Wireless Charging
  • Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Heated 2nd Row Outboard Position Seats
  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Heated and Ventilated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Power Tilt and Telescopic Steering Column
  • 2-Speed Electronic Autotrac Active Transfer Case
  • Wheels: 20" X 9" 6-Spoke Machined Aluminum
  • GMC Pro Safety Plus
  • 275/60R20SL AT BW Tires
  • 3 Years of OnStar Safety and Security
  • Front Skid Plate
  • Hands-Free Power Programmable Rear Liftgate
  • Universal Home Remote
  • Red Horizontal-Mounted Recovery Hooks
  • Bose 9-Speaker Stereo Audio System Feature
  • Black Roof-Mounted Luggage Rack Side Rails
  • Front High-Approach Angle Fascia
  • Magnetic Ride Control Suspension

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Android Auto/Apple CarPlay smart device wireless mirroring
  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Preferred Equipment Group 3LT ($11,950 value)

  • 2 Cargo Nets
  • Chevrolet Infotainment 3 Premium System Radio
  • Custom Leather Wrapped Interior Package
  • Driver Power Bolster Seat Adjuster
  • Electrical Theft Deterrent System
  • GT2 Bucket Seats
  • HD Front and Rear Vision Cameras

  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Memory Driver and Passenger Convenience Package
  • Passenger Power Bolster Seat Adjuster
  • Performance Data and Video Recorder
  • Power Driver Lumbar Control Seat Adjuster
  • Power Passenger Lumbar Control Seat Adjuster
  • Power-Adjustable Outside Heated Mirrors
  • Rear Camera Mirror
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
  • Side Blind Zone Alert
  • Sueded Microfiber-Wrapped Upper Interior Trim Package
  • Universal Home Remote
  • Vehicle Inclination Theft Deterrent Sensor
  • Vehicle Interior Movement Theft Deterrent Sensor
  • Wireless Charging For Devices

Z51 Performance Package ($5,000 value)

  • 245/35ZR19 Front and 305/30ZR20 Rear Blackwall Tires
  • Electronic Limited-Slip Differential
  • Heavy-Duty Cooling System
  • Performance Exhaust with Stainless-Steel Tips
  • Performance Rear Axle Ratio
  • Rear Z51 Spoiler
  • Z51 Performance Brakes
  • Z51 Performance Suspension

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Head-up display - Keep your head up! You don't have to take your eyes off of the road to get information from your dashboard anymore. With head-up display, important driving information - like speed and RPM's - displays on your windshield in your line of sight. Because when you're driving, the most important information lies on the road ahead. Keep your eyes on the road with head-up display.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, 50-STATE CERTIFIED, ENGINE, 6.2L V8 DI, HIGH-OUTPUT, TRANSMISSION, 8-SPEED DUAL CLUTCH, INCLUDES MANUAL AND AUTO MODES, WHEELS, 19" X 8.5" (48.3 CM X 21.6 CM) FRONT AND 20" X 11" (50.8 CM X 27.9 CM) REAR 5-OPEN-SPOKE CARBON FLASH-PAINTED ALUMINUM WITH MACHINED EDGE, TIRES, 245/35ZR19 FRONT AND 305/30ZR20 REAR, BLACKWALL, HIGH PERFORMANCE, TORCH RED, SEATS, GT2 BUCKET, JET BLACK, NAPA LEATHER SEATING SURFACES WITH PERFORATED INSERTS, AUDIO SYSTEM, CHEVROLET INFOTAINMENT 3 PREMIUM SYSTEM WITH CONNECTED NAVIGATION, SEAT BELT COLOR, BLACK, Z51 PERFORMANCE PACKAGE, COOLING SYSTEM, HEAVY-DUTY, DIFFERENTIAL, ELECTRONIC LIMITED SLIP, REAR AXLE, PERFORMANCE RATIO, SUSPENSION, Z51 PERFORMANCE WITH MAGNETIC SELECTIVE RIDE CONTROL, FRONT LIFT ADJUSTABLE HEIGHT WITH MEMORY, BRAKES, Z51 PERFORMANCE, CALIPERS, BRIGHT RED-PAINTED, EXHAUST, PERFORMANCE, SPOILER, REAR, Z51, LICENSE PLATE BRACKET, FRONT, ADRENALINE RED CUSTOM LEATHER STITCH, LPO, ILLUMINATED SILL PLATES, PERFORMANCE TRACTION MANAGEMENT Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area.         • Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.ns0:dealership_address: N8167 Kellom Rd., Beaver Dam, WI 53916
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2015 GMC Acadia SLE offered in Champagne Silver Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Trailering Equipment ($575 value)

  • Heavy-Duty Cooling System
  • Trailer Hitch

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.
  • Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate.

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.
Other notable features: EMISSIONS, CONNECTICUT, DELAWARE, MAINE, MARYLAND, MASSACHUSETTS, NEW JERSEY, NEW YORK, OREGON, PENNSYLVANIA, RHODE ISLAND, VERMONT AND WASHINGTON STATE REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 3.6L SIDI V6, TRANSMISSION, 6-SPEED AUTOMATIC, WHEELS, 4 - 18" X 7.5" (45.7 CM X 19.1 CM) ALUMINUM, SEATING, 7-PASSENGER (2-2-3 SEATING CONFIGURATION), CHAMPAGNE SILVER METALLIC, RECLINING FRONT BUCKETS, EBONY, SEAT TRIM, PREMIUM CLOTH, AUDIO SYSTEM, COLOR TOUCH RADIO WITH INTELLILINK, TRAILERING EQUIPMENT, TRAILER HITCH, FACTORY INSTALLED, COOLING SYSTEM, HEAVY-DUTY, LICENSE PLATE BRACKET, FRONT, SEATS, HEATED DRIVER AND FRONT PASSENGER Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Napleton Chevrolet Buick GMC Beaver Dam is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at N8167 Kellom Rd in Beaver Dam, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin - including Waupun, Horicon, Juneau, Mayville, and Fond du Lac. This 2026 Chevrolet Trax ACTIV is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Trax ACTIV is finished in Sterling Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Driver Confidence Package ($795 value)

  • Adaptive Cruise Control
  • Rear Park Assist
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
  • Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert

Preferred Equipment Group 1SA

    Sunroof Package ($895 value)

    • Power Sliding Glass Sunroof with Manual Shade
    • Wireless Charging

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped.     • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. Napleton Chevrolet Buick GMC Beaver Dam is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at N8167 Kellom Rd in Beaver Dam, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin - including Waupun, Horicon, Juneau, Mayville, and Fond du Lac. This 2026 Buick Envista Avenir is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Buick Envista Avenir is finished in White Frost Tricoat and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Avenir Advanced Safety Package ($795 value)

  • Front Intermittent Rainsense Wipers
  • Power-Adjustable Outside Heated Mirrors
  • Adaptive Cruise Control
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
  • Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert

Preferred Equipment Group G04

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Wireless Apple CarPlay/Wireless Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Convenience

  • Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.
