The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2024 Chevrolet Trax LS offered in Blue Glow Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

LS Convenience Package ($995 value)

  • 17" Silver Painted Aluminum Wheels
  • Body-Color Painted Mirror Caps
  • Carpeted Rear Floor Mats
  • Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Heated Power-Adjustable Outside Mirrors
  • Remote Start

Driver Confidence Package ($395 value)

  • Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert
  • Rear Cross-Traffic Alert
  • Rear Park Assist

Preferred Equipment Group 1LS

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Wireless Apple CarPlay and wireless Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.2L TURBO DOHC DI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), TRANSMISSION, 6-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.50 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 17" (43.2 CM) SILVER-PAINTED ALUMINUM, BLUE GLOW METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK/GRAY WITH BLUE ACCENTS, CLOTH SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, CHEVROLET INFOTAINMENT 3 SYSTEM, LS CONVENIENCE PACKAGE, LPO, FRONT AND REAR SPLASH GUARDS, CUSTOM MOLDED, MIRRORS, OUTSIDE HEATED POWER-ADJUSTABLE, MANUAL-FOLDING, MIRROR CAPS, PAINTED BODY-COLOR, LPO, BLACK BOWTIE EMBLEMS, FRONT AND REAR, LICENSE PLATE FRONT MOUNTING PACKAGE, SEATS, HEATED DRIVER AND FRONT PASSENGER, FLOOR MATS, CARPETED REAR, LPO, CARGO NET, JET BLACK, REMOTE START Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 920-212-8287 or stop by to test drive or inquire about your new car or truck today! Napleton Chevrolet Buick GMC Beaver Dam is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at N8167 Kellom Rd in Beaver Dam, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin - including Waupun, Horicon, Juneau, Mayville, and Fond du Lac. This 2026 GMC Acadia AWD Elevation is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 GMC Acadia AWD Elevation is finished in Ebony Twilight Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, 2.5L TURBO DOHC SIDI, EBONY TWILIGHT METALLIC Want more detail on this Acadia, its pricing, or current GM offers? Reach out to Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options. Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout Dodge County and south-central Wisconsin. Give us a call at 920-212-8287 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Chevrolet Buick GMC Beaver Dam advertises its inventory on this website, [www.napletonchevybuickgmc.com](https://www.napletonchevybuickgmc.com), as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on [www.napletonchevybuickgmc.com](https://www.napletonchevybuickgmc.com) represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Chevrolet Buick GMC Beaver Dam. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on [www.napletonchevybuickgmc.com](https://www.napletonchevybuickgmc.com) will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2022 Nissan Frontier PRO-4X offered in Boulder Grey Pearl will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Technology Package ($990 value)

  • Blind Spot Warning (BSW)
  • High Beam Assist (HBA)
  • Intelligent Cruise Control (ICC)
  • Lane Departure Warning (LDW)
  • Rear Automatic Braking (RAB)
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert (RCTA)
  • Rear Sonar System
  • Traffic Sign Recognition (TSR)

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Wireless Apple CarPlay/Wired Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • NissanConnect featuring Wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: BOULDER GREY PEARL, CHARCOAL W/LAVA RED STIT, PRO EMBROIDERED PREMIUM CLOTH SEAT TRIM, [V02] TECHNOLOGY PACKAGE, [C03] 50 STATE EMISSIONS, [N10] REMOTE ENGINE START, [B94] PRO-4X MUD FLAPS, [F95] OFF-ROAD PROTECTION PACKAGE Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 920-212-8287 or stop by to test drive or inquire about your new car or truck today! Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

This 2026 Chevrolet Suburban Z71 is finished in Sterling Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Technology and Telematics
